name: Valkyrie: Dawn of Ragnarok
short_description: At Lord Odin's behest, Lilyth went to gather the souls of fallen warriors, bolstering Asgard's forces for the impending clash between Niflheim and Muspelheim. This marked the start of the most ferocious war ever: Ragnarok.
detailed_description:
Recommended For You



About the Game

"Defeats fierce monsters, loots treasures while trying to survive in the dark dungeon".
Take on the role of Lilyth - a Valkyrie goddess, sent by Lord Odin to Midgard to gather the souls of fallen warriors, bolstering Asgard's forces in preparation for the synergy between Niflheim and Muspelheim. This marks the start of Ragnarok, the most intense war in history.

You will face a challenging journey, with innumerable monsters standing in your way and growing more powerful by the second. To make it through, you must stay agile and adjust your fighting technique to whatever the situation requires.

Key Features

- Classic dungeon crawling RPG.

- Managing party and battle tactics.
